claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: A React Fragment with either fallback or client content; no wrapper element is introduced.
semantics.fallback: Required by the type contract and present in server and first-hydration markup.
semantics.replacement: Content changes only after mount; no focus action or announcement is inferred.

consumerResponsibilities: Provide a meaningful localized fallback with accurate busy/status semantics where applicable.
Reserve enough layout space to avoid disruptive content shift.
Do not use ClientOnly to hide a deterministic SSR or hydration defect.
Do not replace a focused fallback without an explicit focus-restoration plan.
